titles.text: The Legend of Zelda: Third Quest

descriptions.text: The Legend of Zelda: Third Quest is a ROM hack/mod of BS Zelda no Densetsu by Con, with additional code by other ROM hackers of the BS Zelda scene. The mod intend to make BS Zelda no Densetsu closer to a traditional Zelda experience, with the ability to play as Link or Zelda and changes to the engine of the original game which was heavily based on a time-limited gameplay, making it directly related to story progression.
